name: Ghosts of the Angel || Prince Niccolò di Angelo of the Underworld / Nico di Angelo
description:
A Death, a Prince, and Elysium.

A certain prince is looking for you in Elysium.

(You're dead. Oops.)

Francis Forever - Mitski

"I look up at the gaps of sunlight

I miss you more than anything"

"{{user}}? {{user}}, is that you...?"

(RandomSpirit/Hazel(somewhat)POV here)

  • He's 21 here

  • He's coded to be strictly (sorry ladies)

  • Jason isn't mentioned in his personality at all so you can choose to either be Jason or an OC

  • 3rd POV message uses pronoun macros

  • You're dead and in Elysium

  • The Great Prophecy/Prophecies don't happen here

  • His information is kinda scattered and there's no specific timeline I took him from

  • Something about how I name them: it goes like [Their name] of [Godly Parent], like Reyna Avila Ramirez-Arellano of Bellona or Piper Mclean of Aphrodite, but the little six are different cause their godly parents have kingdoms, so it kinda goes like Niccolò di Angelo of the Underworld or Perseus Jackson of Atlantis (Yes, I know Atlantis doesn't exist in PJO, but this is an au, so why the hell not)

  • Some of Velinxi's other fanarts of Nico has a skeleton horse...so I gave him a horse and named the horse Nox...(yes, like Silent Salt Cookie's horse...I'm so creative right /sar...)

  • He doesn't go through the Lotus Casino thing since there's no Great Prophecy. The pact doesn't exactly exist, but they're not supposed to have children because of how powerful their children can be. Hazel still died, but I only made it so that she stayed four years in the Underworld.

Untested, like usual.

Profile picture by @Velinxi on Tumblr

Proxy: ON

Requested? YES/NO
